programme.title: Phineas and Ferb

programme.desc: Kiff and Barry accidentally cause a townwide blackout by upsetting a Lighthouse Keeper. Kiff has dinner at the Buns's and has to hide that she hates the food.

programme.title: The Little Mermaid
programme.desc: In Disney's beguiling animated romp, rebellious 16-year-old mermaid Ariel (Jodi Benson) is fascinated with life on land. On one of her visits to the surface, which are forbidden by her controlling father, King Triton, she falls for a human prince. Determined to be with her new love, Ariel makes a dangerous deal with the sea witch Ursula (Pat Carroll) to become human for three days. But when plans go awry for the star-crossed lovers, the king must make the ultimate sacrifice for his daughter.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Elemental
programme.desc: In a city where fire, water, land and air residents live together, a fiery young woman and a go-with-the-flow guy discover something elemental: how much they actually have in common.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Up
programme.desc: Carl Fredricksen, a 78-year-old balloon salesman, is about to fulfill a lifelong dream. Tying thousands of balloons to his house, he flies away to the South American wilderness. But curmudgeonly Carl's worst nightmare comes true when he discovers a little boy named Russell is a stowaway aboard the balloon-powered house.

programme.title: Raya and the Last Dragon
programme.desc: Long ago, in the fantasy world of Kumandra, humans and dragons lived together in harmony. However, when sinister monsters known as the Druun threatened the land, the dragons sacrificed themselves to save humanity. Now, 500 years later, those same monsters have returned, and it's up to a lone warrior to track down the last dragon and stop the Druun for good.

programme.title: Rio 2
programme.desc: Blue macaws Blu (Jesse Eisenberg), Jewel (Anne Hathaway) and their three children are comfortably settled in the city -- perhaps too comfortably. Jewel fears that the children are becoming more like humans than birds. After learning that she and Blu may not be the last blue macaws after all, Jewel decides that their little family should visit the Amazon jungle. It's there that Blu meets his formidable father-in-law (Andy Garcia) and goes beak-to-beak with archnemesis Nigel (Jemaine Clement).

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Squeakquel
programme.desc: Now in the care of Dave Seville's nephew, chipmunks Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a break from pop-music stardom and return to school. Almost immediately, the tiny tunesmiths get the giant task of saving their school's music program by winning a battle-of-the-bands contest. Though the boys think winning it will be easy, romantic and musical sparks fly when they meet Brittany, Eleanor and Jeanette -- also known as The Chipettes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wreck-It Ralph
programme.desc: Arcade-game character Wreck-It Ralph is tired of always being the bad guy and losing to his good guy opponent, Fix-It Felix. Finally, after decades of seeing all the glory go to Felix, Ralph decides to take matters into his own hands. He sets off on a game-hopping trip to prove that he has what it takes to be a hero. However, while on his quest, Ralph accidentally unleashes a deadly enemy that threatens the entire arcade.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: Chip Whistler and Bill hit it off and become friends at Farm Con; Cricket stumbles into having 100 dollars and immediately buys into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: Young Bill does whatever it takes to help keep the family farm in business; Tilly and Nancy enjoy Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store.

programme.desc: When Cricket's crush returns, Remy takes the opportunity to help Cricket get to know her; the family wants to visit a street fair, but Bill wants to stay home to save money.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: When Vee's fritzing knocks out a fang, an unexpected chain of events draws her and Britney closer—just as Elijah and Sophie race to fix the situation.

programme.sub-title: Curse Me Baby One More Time
programme.desc: When Roman excels at his wizard lessons, Billie feels threatened and uses a Reverse Curse to slow him down, but it accidentally turns him into a baby.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: To allow Alix to celebrate her birthday with her friends and family, Marinette gets the Rabbit Miraculous back and becomes the Keeper of Time for a few hours.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien are the most famous couple in Paris; they catch the attention of an unscrupulous influencer who will do anything to generate buzz.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
